mapper.select: SELECT br.id, br.book_id, br.reader_id, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.status, br.fine, br.remark, b.name AS book_name, r.name AS reader_name FROM borrow br LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN reader r ON br.reader_id = r.id WHERE br.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow (book_id, reader_id, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, status, fine, remark) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{readerId}, #{borrowDate}, #{dueDate}, #{returnDate}, #{status}, #{fine}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND status IN ('BORROWED','OVERDUE')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow WHERE status = 'OVERDUE'
